description: Remove the 'Also Proficient In' section and the 'Technical Matrix' heading/section from the Skills page. The user wants to remove the secondary skills strip and the matrix header entirely. Since the About section now has a Soft Skill & Hard Skill tab, the Skills section becomes redundant or needs to be significantly reduced/removed.
steps: In src/sections/Skills.tsx: Remove the 'Also Proficient In' (alsoProficient) secondary skills grid section entirely - this is the motion.div at the bottom with bg-white/50 that contains secondarySkills.

Remove the section header that says 'Technical Matrix' (the h2 with t('sections.skills.technicalMatrix') and t('sections.skills.matrixItalic')). Replace with a simpler heading or remove the entire Skills section if it becomes redundant.

Since the user specifically says 'hapus section juga mahir dalam & keahlian teknis matriks' (remove 'also proficient in' section AND 'technical matrix' section), remove the Skills section entirely from App.tsx. Remove the lazy import of Skills, remove the <Skills /> component render, and remove the marquee divider between Projects and Skills.

Remove the 'skills' nav item from Navbar and locale files since the section no longer exists. Update navItems array in Navbar.tsx, remove the skills entry from TableOfContents sections array, and update locale nav keys.
Clean up: Remove src/sections/Skills.tsx file or leave it but ensure it's not imported. Remove the 'skills' section ID references from the active section tracking in Navbar.
acceptance_criteria: The Skills section is completely removed from the page
Navigation no longer shows a Skills/Matrix link
No references to the Skills section remain in active components
The page flows directly from Projects to Contact
Build passes with npm run build
findings: Skills section fully removed. Build passes clean. The Marquee component is still imported in App.tsx and used for the Hero-to-About divider, so that import remains valid.
